channel.title: Zero Note Comparisons on Zero Note: Self-destruct shareable notes

item.title: Privnote vs Zero Note (2026): Which Secure Note Tool Should You Use?
item.description: Compare Privnote vs Zero Note. Learn the differences in control, privacy, notifications, and mobile experience to choose the right secure note sharing tool.
